name: Frijoles Borrachos ('Drunken' Beans)
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cup Dried pinto or kidney beans
2 Jalapeños or other small hot chiles, stemmed, seeded
2 cup Chicken broth (regular strength) or water
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the beans and place them in a large bowl. Cover with cold water and soak at room temperature for at least 12 hours.
2. Heat oil in an 8 to 10 quart pan over medium heat. When oil is hot, add bacon and cook until lightly browned.
3. Add chiles, onion, and garlic and continue to cook, stirring until vegetables are soft (about 5 minutes).
4. Add beans, beer, broth, tomato sauce, oregano, and cumin; bring to a boil, stirring.
5. Reduce heat, partially cover the pan, and simmer, stirring often, until beans are tender and most of the liquid is absorbed (about 2 1/2 hours).
6. Makes 8 to 10 servings.
